title: ArcSight Incidents
description: The OpenCTI ArcSight Incidents connector imports cases from ArcSight ESM into OpenCTI as STIX Case-Incidents. It periodically fetches cases through the ESM Service Layer REST API (CaseService) and converts them to STIX 2.1 Case-Incidents (with severity, priority, timestamps and an external reference), since ArcSight cases are case-management artifacts. Paired with the ArcSight stream connector (which pushes IOCs to ESM Active Lists), it provides a bidirectional integration.
short_description: Import ArcSight ESM cases into OpenCTI as STIX Case-Incidents (bidirectional import side).
